svg.title: PrepForge system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: React frontend, Node/Express backend with AI layer, and MongoDB database

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What pages and components should the PrepForge frontend have?')
sendPrompt('How should the PrepForge dashboard be designed?')
sendPrompt('How should the daily execution tracker UI work in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('How should the AI Mentor chat UI work in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('How should JWT auth be implemented in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('How should the smart planner generate day-wise plans in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('How does the evaluator system work in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('How should the AI Mentor chat backend be built?')
sendPrompt('What MongoDB collections should PrepForge have?')
sendPrompt('How should daily logs and scores be stored in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('What prompts should the evaluator send to OpenAI in PrepForge?')
sendPrompt('What system prompt should the AI Mentor use in PrepForge?')
